title: Topic detail page component with navigation and actions
purpose: Displays a full topic detail view with document viewer and provides navigation and action handlers for back, edit, and delete operations.
module_context: Exports a React functional component TopicDetailPage that accepts topic name and action callbacks as props, and renders a layout with header and topic detail component.

steps.content: Accept topic name and action callbacks as props.
Define handler for back navigation that uses provided callback or defaults to dashboard.
Define handler for edit action that uses provided callback or defaults to edit page.
Define handler for delete action that uses provided callback or shows confirmation and logs deletion.
Render layout with header and topic detail component.
Pass all handlers and topic name to the topic detail component.
IF a back callback is provided, invoke it.
ELSE navigate to the topics list page.
IF an edit callback is provided, invoke it with the topic name.
ELSE navigate to the topic edit page.
IF a delete callback is provided, invoke it with the topic name.
ELSE show a confirmation dialog for deletion.
IF deletion is confirmed, log the deletion action.
Navigate back to the topics list after deletion.
